items.title: Palestinians say Israeli settlers torch mosque, factory
items.summary: More than two dozen settlers, some masked, attacked the Al-Taqwa mosque in the village of Al-Tuwani during the night and set it on fire, Mohammed Rabie, head of the village coun...

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Edge Closer to Wider War After U.S. Soldiers Killed
items.summary: The United States was said to be sending more warplanes to the Middle East, a move that was already in the works before Iranian fire killed two soldiers in Jordan.

items.title: Ferry carrying 133 passengers and crew sinks off Guyana coast
items.summary: Fifteen children are among 67 people rescued, officials say, with dozens still missing.
